43220610072","book_info":{"abstract":"【网游+现实入侵+神级天赋+数据流+爽文】
本作又名《完蛋，美女NPC硬要我吃软饭》、《梦中垂死惊坐起，魅魔竟是我自己》
一款名为《神迹》的神秘游戏降临，全民穿越链接！游戏属性、技能、道具转化现实！甚至坐骑宠物NPC都可带至现实！据传还隐藏着登上神位的秘密！
陈斌在进入游戏时，觉醒了逆天神级天赋！但他的天赋有一点怪——
游戏内所有NPC，对陈斌好感度直接拉满！
于是乎，陈斌的游戏画风开始变得不对劲了。
性感新手导师，手把手教隐藏职业！
邻家温婉人妻，全程带飞躺着升级！
邪魅魔教圣女，叛教为给他送神器！
当别人还在小心翼翼组队刷怪时，怪物已经蹭着陈斌大腿给他做宠物了！
当别的公会被BOSS团灭时，帝王级BOSS已经跪下求着陈斌收它当坐骑！
在软饭吃撑后，陈斌发现，自己居然被NPC们宠成了至高神明，受万界朝拜……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o37ade29104bf7e159c46e73a3462aafb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"白日梦的九","author_id":"","book_id":"7366094843220610072","book_name":"网游：我的队友全是NPC！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7366094914301461016","read_count":"176","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"383125"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"136","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,网游","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o37ade29104bf7e159c46e73a3462aafb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183092&x-signature=2XP6u0ymdZhwUJ0IwzbADFeMI0s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3591417842106936","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017313205F47B2736B998B089BF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4632,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1720},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7460542320067347224","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真实客观
